expectations.text: Output includes a coverage matrix mapping design elements to test cases
expectations.evidence: No coverage_matrix.md file exists in the without_skill/outputs directory. The test file itself contains no coverage matrix or mapping table.

expectations.text: Every behavior rule (startup clamping, cruise rate-of-change, emergency shutdown, was_clamped flag) has at least one test
expectations.evidence: Startup clamping: TestStartupMode class with test_startup_below_minimum, test_startup_above_maximum, etc. Cruise rate-of-change: TestRateOfChange class with test_roc_increase_exceeds_limit, test_roc_decrease_exceeds_limit, etc. Emergency shutdown: TestEmergencyShutdown with test_emergency_any_requested_rate, test_emergency_zero_requested. was_clamped flag: TestClampingFlag class with test_was_clamped_consistency_when_changed, test_was_clamped_consistency_when_unchanged.

expectations.text: Every error_handling entry (negative rate, negative elapsed_time, unrecognized mode) has a dedicated test
expectations.evidence: Negative rate: test_negative_requested_rate and test_negative_requested_rate_startup in TestErrorHandling. Negative elapsed_time: test_negative_elapsed_time_startup and test_negative_elapsed_time_cruise. Unrecognized mode: test_invalid_operational_mode (passes 'invalid_mode' string) and test_invalid_mode_with_none (passes None).

expectations.text: Boundary values tested for requested_rate (0.0, negative, at STARTUP_MIN, at STARTUP_MAX, at CRUISE_MAX)
expectations.evidence: 0.0: test_cruise_zero_rate and test_startup_zero_requested. Negative: test_negative_requested_rate (-10.0). At STARTUP_MIN (10.0): test_startup_at_minimum. At STARTUP_MAX (50.0): test_startup_at_maximum. At CRUISE_MAX (200.0): test_cruise_at_maximum.

expectations.text: No test uses 'assert does not raise' or 'assert no exception' as its only assertion
expectations.evidence: All tests include concrete assertions on actual rate, was_clamped, and/or reason values. No test relies solely on absence-of-exception.

expectations.text: Test names describe the scenario being tested, not just the method name
expectations.evidence: Test names are descriptive: test_startup_below_minimum, test_roc_increase_exceeds_limit, test_emergency_any_requested_rate, test_negative_elapsed_time_cruise, test_mode_transition_startup_to_cruise. None are just test_limit or test_call.

expectations.text: Stateful behavior tested: rate-of-change limiting requires multiple sequential calls
expectations.evidence: TestRateOfChange class uses multiple sequential calls extensively (e.g., test_roc_increase_within_limit sets previous_rate via first call then tests second call). TestStateAndSequencing class has test_previous_rate_updates (3 sequential calls), test_mode_transition_startup_to_cruise (2 calls), test_recovery_after_emergency (3 calls).

expectations.text: Configuration variants tested: at least one test with non-default config values
expectations.evidence: TestConfiguration class uses limiter_custom fixture with non-default values (startup_min_rate=5.0, startup_max_rate=25.0, cruise_max_rate=100.0, max_rate_change=50.0). Tests: test_custom_startup_min, test_custom_startup_max, test_custom_cruise_max, test_custom_max_rate_change all verify behavior with these non-default values.
